assignment: Discovery only. Run exactly one Node 26 allocation-sampling observation whose accepted bytes are attributed only to a dedicated named allocateOne leaf that the zero control never calls. Predeclare exact-zero attributed bytes <= 0, positive one-control signal, two-to-one ratio [1.8,2.2], and minimum signal-to-noise 10 before execution. Use in-heap JavaScript objects, fixed batch and sampler settings. Save raw profile and deterministic replay. Never repeat until favorable. No product, benchmark, or .okra edits.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: One observation per control; accept or reject the method and stop.

output_schema: Executable checkpoint with frozen thresholds, exact script/command/hash, raw attributed bytes, arithmetic, controls, replay, walls, and downstream decision. Worker evidence is not acceptance.
